messages.content: Want to speak to you reg the school
Want to speak to you reg the school

I had sent my sister to collect form for upper nursery. She was told no forms are being issued for UN. Will require yr help and support on this

Regards
Pawan Lohia

Welcome back from the holidays! 

I can understand it will be hectic time ahead for you, request yr help to see if there is any vacancy for my daughter Garimaa Lohia whose form I have sent u over mail.

I shall be greatly obliged if you could help us save 1 term of hers. looking forward in anticipation

Regards
Pawan Lohia
